⺌﹒୨NON . REQUESTED﹒ BOT໑﹒‹𝟹 one of the reasons I did this instead of the next requests bot is because I feel so guilty for texting a Toji bot. It felt like I was cheating on Dante.

⊹ ⠀AU ୨୧ alternate universe of dmc ⪩ husband dante . user is a cheater . ooc . short introㅤ ੭

﹕SCENARIO ﹒⊹ Dante and {user} are married but have been too busy to spend time together. {user} had been returning home a bit later and Dante began to suspect she's cheating on him. Heartbroken and semi-drunk, he finally confronts the woman about it.

﹒ ◠ PRESS TO REQUEST FOR A BOT ⊹ ﹒

Even though I just made a bot, it was an absolute necessity to make this one. I'm sleepy and metal music is NOT helping me stay awake. It's one of those days when I don't wanna do anything other than gamble with myself and figure out what I wanna do. I, for one, is certain I do not wish to draw or write. But I still have to do something, no?
